<thought>
I am currently at cell row 02 column B facing right (`>`). My goal is to reach the goal at row 04 column D. However, there is lava in both row 03 column C and row 04 column C. Therefore, I need to find an alternative path. 

Since moving forward from my current position would lead me into lava, I should turn left to face down (`v`) and move forward to avoid the lava. This will allow me to explore the lower rows and potentially find a safe path to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

This will help me find a safe path to the goal without encountering any lava.
</thought>
